label: Game Ad Research Collector
description: Collect game-market RSS context, build public ad-library search URLs, optionally scrape public video media, download authorized videos, and return local artifact paths.

inputSchema.label: Genre
inputSchema.description: Game genre or creative category to research, for example SLG, RPG, puzzle, or 4X strategy.

inputSchema.label: Search Terms
inputSchema.description: Comma-separated, newline-separated, or JSON-array ad-library search terms. Defaults to the genre.

inputSchema.label: Country
inputSchema.description: Facebook Ad Library country code. Defaults to US.

inputSchema.label: Days Back
inputSchema.description: Lookback window in days for ad-library search URLs. Defaults to 7.

inputSchema.label: Top Fetch Per Term
inputSchema.description: Maximum video URLs to download per ad-library search term. Defaults to 2 and is capped at 10.

inputSchema.label: Feed URLs
inputSchema.description: Optional RSS/Atom feed URLs as newline-separated text, comma-separated text, JSON array, or JSON object.

inputSchema.label: Max News Items
inputSchema.description: Maximum RSS items to fetch across feeds. Defaults to 12 and is capped at 50.

inputSchema.label: Enable Ads
inputSchema.description: When false, skips Facebook Ad Library collection.

inputSchema.label: Use Playwright
inputSchema.description: When true, attempts dynamic public ad-library media discovery with Playwright.

inputSchema.label: Timeout Seconds
inputSchema.description: HTTP timeout per request. Defaults to 20 seconds.

outputSchema.label: Genre
outputSchema.description: Genre used for this collection run.

outputSchema.label: Summary
outputSchema.description: Compact execution summary and artifact location.

outputSchema.label: RSS Items
outputSchema.description: Fetched RSS/Atom items with titles, links, summaries, and local article documents.

outputSchema.label: Ad Items
outputSchema.description: Ad-library search records with search URLs, discovered video URLs, downloaded local videos, and warnings.

outputSchema.label: Downloaded Files
outputSchema.description: Downloaded video artifact references with local_path, filename, content_type, source URL, and size.

outputSchema.label: Source Documents
outputSchema.description: Local markdown/json document artifacts for RSS articles and collection manifests.

outputSchema.label: Warnings
outputSchema.description: Non-fatal collection warnings such as optional Playwright availability.

outputSchema.label: Error
outputSchema.description: Error message when status is failed.
